dependencies.description:
Client library to download and publish models, datasets and other repos
on the huggingface.co hub.
dependencies.name: py-huggingface-hub

dependencies.description: Fundamental package for array computing in Python.
dependencies.name: py-numpy

dependencies.description: The PyPA recommended tool for installing Python packages.
dependencies.name: py-pip

dependencies.description:
psutil is a cross-platform library for retrieving information on running
processes and system utilization (CPU, memory, disks, network) in
Python.
dependencies.name: py-psutil

dependencies.description: PyYAML is a YAML parser and emitter for Python.
dependencies.name: py-pyyaml

dependencies.description:
A Python utility that aids in the process of downloading, building,
upgrading, installing, and uninstalling Python packages.
dependencies.name: py-setuptools

dependencies.description:
Tensors and Dynamic neural networks in Python with strong GPU
acceleration.
dependencies.name: py-torch

dependencies.description: A Spack managed Python virtual environment
dependencies.name: python-venv

dependent_to.description:
AlpacaFarm is a simulator that enables research and development on
learning from feedback at a fraction of the usual cost, promoting
accessible research on instruction following and alignment.
dependent_to.name: py-alpaca-farm

dependent_to.description:
Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) methods enable efficient
adaptation of pre-trained language models (PLMs) to various downstream
applications without fine-tuning all the model's parameters.
dependent_to.name: py-peft

dependent_to.description:
A collection of open source benchmarks used to evaluate PyTorch
performance.
dependent_to.name: py-torchbenchmark

dependent_to.description:
A library for accelerating Transformer models on NVIDIA GPUs, including
fp8 precision on Hopper GPUs.
dependent_to.name: py-transformer-engine

dependent_to.description:
trl is a full stack library where we provide a set of tools to train
transformer language models and stable diffusion models with
Reinforcement Learning, from the Supervised Fine-tuning step (SFT),
Reward Modeling step (RM) to the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO)
step.
dependent_to.name: py-trl

description:
A simple way to train and use PyTorch models with multi-GPU, TPU, mixed-
precision.
name: py-accelerate

variants.description: Build systems supported by the package
variants.name: build_system
